target_rules: Preserve the source object name exactly unless the source SQL explicitly renames it.
Do not emit SQL Server-only brackets, batch separators, or session settings.

unsupported_object_types.table: SQL Server table extraction is not implemented in this tool yet. Skip table migration from SQL Server or add deterministic extraction support first.
unsupported_object_types.sequence: MySQL does not support SQL Server-style standalone sequence migration directly in this tool.
unsupported_object_types.synonym: MySQL does not support synonym objects. Convert manually to views or application-level indirection.
unsupported_object_types.cursor: Standalone cursor objects are not supported as migratable objects for MySQL in this tool.

view: Convert SQL Server view syntax to valid MySQL view syntax.
storedprocedure: Convert SQL Server procedure syntax to one valid MySQL CREATE PROCEDURE statement without DELIMITER directives.
function: Convert SQL Server function syntax to one valid MySQL CREATE FUNCTION statement.
trigger: Convert SQL Server trigger syntax to one valid MySQL CREATE TRIGGER statement.
